mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, requester_id, runner_id, reason, status, handled_by, handle_note, handled_at, requester_read_at, runner_read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM order_cancel_requests WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_id, requester_id, runner_id, reason, status, handled_by, handle_note, handled_at, requester_read_at, runner_read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM order_cancel_requests WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_id, requester_id, runner_id, reason, status, handled_by, handle_note, handled_at, requester_read_at, runner_read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM order_cancel_requests WHERE runner_id = #{runnerId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
